历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 15182 → 60459 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 18128 → 14366 → 25577. After a severe gap in 2022, rankings gradually recovered, but in 2025, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the physics category ranking shifted back to 25577, showing significant fluctuations in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi science (physics category): 118 in 2021 → 121 in 2022 → 127 in 2023 → 129 in 2024 → 131 in 2025 → 119 in 2026, with a reduction of 12 students (-9.2%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a notable decrease that intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been steadily rising: 53rd in 2021 → 51st in 2022 → 46th in 2023 → 50th in 2024 → 50th in 2025 → 44th in 2026, with a continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but among 14 events, 13 are neutral and only 1 is negative (rumor of cat abuse has been clarified), making the overall public opinion controllable. Douyin heat ranks 8th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. In 2022, there was a sharp drop in the admission score line (high attention), but after 2023, the ranking has gradually stabilized and recovered, with the lagging impact of the historical gap basically absorbed. The university is known for medicine, materials, chemistry, etc., with clinical medicine, stomatology, computer science, and other majors ranking high in Shaanxi admissions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, clinical medicine, and stomatology continue to have high social popularity; majors like civil engineering, biology, chemistry, environment, and materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, with a significant growth in the examinee population, intensifying competition. Zhengzhou University is located in Henan (neighboring province), and Shaanxi examinees have a high recognition of neighboring province 211 universities. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.8% (2025), which is a medium scale for cross-provincial enrollment, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 25577, a 9.2% enrollment reduction in 2026, and a 19.7% increase in physics category examinees, competition is significantly intensified, and the ranking is expected to move forward. The continuous rise in Soft Science ranking positively supports application heat, and high Douyin heat reflects sustained attention. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23671, with a range of 23171–24171.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, you should safely rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.
